name: Fruit and Ham Loaf- Slow Cooker
recipeInstructions:
Serves 6 to 8
1. In a small bowl, combine fruit bits and apple butter.
2. In a large bowl, combine egg, milk, graham cracker crumbs, pepper, ground ham, and ground pork.
3. Crisscross 3 foil strips atop a sheet of waxed paper to keep the counter clean.
4. In the center of the foil strips, pat half of the meat mixture into a 7-inch circle.
5. Spread fruit mixture on the meat circle, leaving at least 1 inch from the edges.
6. Top with remaining meat mixture and press edges of meat to seal well.
7. Bring up foil strips, lift and transfer to any size Crock-Pot.
8. Press meat away from sides of Crock-Pot to avoid excess browning. Cover and cook on Low for 8 to 10 hours or on High for 4 to 6 hours.
9. The loaf is done when a meat thermometer inserted reads 170 degrees F.
10. In a small bowl, combine brown sugar, apple juice, and dry mustard. Spread over the meat.
11. Cover and cook on Low or High heat for an additional 30 minutes.
12. Using foil strips, lift the ham loaf from the Crock-Pot and transfer to a serving plate; discard foil strips.
13. Serve.
